---

name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for React2Next
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
-------------

## 🚀 Feature Description

Describe the feature you would like to see added.

---

## 🎯 Problem It Solves

Explain the problem this feature solves.

Example:

"React2Next does not currently migrate React Router dynamic routes."

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe how this feature could be implemented.

Example:

Convert:

<Route path="/blog/:id" element={<Blog />} />

To:

app/blog/[id]/page.tsx

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.

---

## 📌 Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or screenshots.
